Uses of Class
in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.model.VersionedComponent

  • Packages that use VersionedComponent 
    Package Description
    in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.model  

    • Uses of VersionedComponent in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.model

      Subclasses of VersionedComponent in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.model 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  Component
      Component is an abstract class which has been derived from VersionedComponent class.
      class  CompositeDescription
      CompositeDescription is extended from Description.
      class  Concept
      Concept is a clinical idea associated with a unique identifier .
      class  ConcreteRelationship
      Concrete Relationship represents an association between concept and concrete domain.
      class  Derivative
      Derivative is an abstract class inherited from VersionedComponent class Reference sets are also part of Derivatives.
      class  Description
      Description is a human readable text of a concept.
      class  Identifier
      Class inherited from VersionedComponent class.
      class  RefSetMember
      Abstract class RefSetMember derived from Derivative Each Refset shall be added as a separate class that shall inherit this class
      class  Relationship
      Relationship represents an association between two concepts.
      class  SimpleMapRefset  
      Methods in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.model that return VersionedComponent 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      VersionedComponent ComponentFactory.getComponent​(EnumComponent componentType, java.lang.String id)
      Function to return the object of the desired Component type.
